hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" | grep -qiE "(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token|bearer)[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*['\"][a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{8,}" && { echo 'BLOCKED: hardcoded secret detected in command'; exit 1; } || exit 0

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT" | grep -qiE "(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token|bearer)[[:space:]]*[:=][[:space:]]*['\"][a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{16,}" && { echo 'BLOCKED: hardcoded secret detected in file content'; exit 1; } || exit 0
